body.title: Granny MCP shim + channel fix for observability
body.result: GrannyShim added with 4 MCP tools; channel posts now human-readable via unseen_university.channel; deprecated TheIgors path removed; 10 tests pass
body.description:
Granny has no MCP shim and uses a deprecated channel path. Fix both: (1) add devices/granny/shim.py exposing route_ticket, intake_ticket, edge_weights, health via MCP; (2) replace _post_to_channel with unseen_university.channel.post_to_channel + human-readable messages instead of GRANNY_ROUTE:T-xxx codes.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/shim.py (new), devices/granny/device.py (channel fix)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — shim with 4 tools + channel message fix; OUT — no routing logic changes
**Test plan:** tests/test_granny_shim.py: shim self_test passes; intake_ticket returns AuditResult shape; channel post uses human-readable message format
